title: Award Drinkware

products.title: Polar Camel 15 oz. Black Vacuum Insulated Mug with Slider Lid
products.displayName: Polar Camel 15 oz. Black Vacuum Insulated Mug with Slider Lid
products.description: 15 oz. Stainless Steel Polar Camel Mugs feature doubl-wall, vacuum insulation with a clear, slider lid. They are 2X heat and cold resistant compared to other tumblers. Polar Camels are made from 18/8 gauge stainless steel (18% chromium/8% nickel) - also known as Type 304 Food Grade.
products.imageAlt: Black Polar Camel 15 oz. Vacuum Insulated Mug with Slider Lid

products.title: Polar Camel 40 oz. Black Travel Mug with Snap Lid & Straw
products.displayName: Polar Camel 40 oz. Black Travel Mug with Snap Lid & Straw
products.description: The same high endurance drinkware that Polar Camel has become known for is now available in a 40 oz. Travel Mug with a handle, straw included. This mug is available in several vibrant colors of powder coated finish that laser beautifully! These travel mugs are great for personalized gifts, usable awards, souvenirs, and fundraisers!

products.title: Polar Camel 12 oz. Black Water Bottle
products.displayName: Polar Camel 12 oz. Black Water Bottle
products.description: The superior hot & cold retention of the double wall insulated Polar Camel high endurance drinkware is now available in a water bottle! The screw on  lid features an easy flip top, soft rubber finger hold, raised ridges for  easy opening and closing, and a rigid & removable straw for easy cleaning. Polar Camel Water Bottles are available in Stainless Steel and 17 vibrant  Powder Coated colors to choose from! The 12 oz. size is perfect for younger kids!
products.imageAlt: Black Polar Camel 12 oz. Water Bottle

products.title: Polar Camel 20 oz. Black/Bright Gold ION-Plated Ringneck Tumbler with Slider Lid
products.displayName: Polar Camel 20 oz. Black/Bright Gold ION-Plated Ringneck Tumbler with Slider Lid
products.description: The 20 oz. Stainless Steel Polar Camel Tumbler features a Bright Gold top band and ION-Plating under a vibrant powder-coated finish that results in a stunning contrast when lasered. Double wall insulation provides 2X the heat/cold retention of normal tumblers, keeping your beverage at just the righttemperature. The tumbler is tapered at the bottom to fit most standard cup holders and comes with a plastic slider lid. Bright gold ION-Plated tumblers are available in 6 gorgeous colors!
products.imageAlt: Polar Camel 20 oz. Black/Bright Gold ION-Plated Ringneck Tumbler with Slider Lid

products.title: Polar Camel 20 oz. White Golf Tumbler - Smooth Center with Dimples and Slider Lid
products.displayName: Polar Camel 20 oz. White Golf Tumbler - Smooth Center with Dimples and Slider Lid
products.description: If you're looking for a new and unique award for a golf tournament or a    great personalized gift for the golfers in your life, this Polar Camel 20  oz. tumbler with dimples is perfect! The tumbler resembles a golf ball and can be personalized with the graphics of your choice! The tumbler has the  heat/cold retention properties you expect from Polar Camel drinkware and   comes with a slider lid to prevent spills. Tapered at the bottom it fits   most cup holders. Great for fundraisers, too!
products.imageAlt: Polar Camel 20 oz. White Golf Tumbler - Smooth Center with Dimples and Slider Lid
